held_out.source_modes_eligible: tasks with ground_truth.chosen_output AND rejected_output (style_guide_pair + a few others)

delta_a.name: trained vs Week-10-baseline (untrained backbone, same scale)

delta_b.name: trained vs prompt-engineered same-backbone
delta_b.honest_note: Per the brief: a flat or negative Delta B is a legitimate, publishable finding. Report as-is.

delta_c_informational.name: Week 10 τ²-Bench retail (informational only, NO re-run per brief)
delta_c_informational.interpretation: Tenacious-Bench is a different distribution. The trained judge was not trained on retail-domain tasks; we do not expect or claim Delta-C lift. Tenacious-Bench lift is Tenacious-specific by construction.
